name: Italian Game
description: A classical opening based on rapid development and pressure on f7.

name: Ruy Lopez
description: A rich positional opening where White pressures the knight on c6 and fights for the center.

name: Scotch Game
description: A direct opening that challenges the center early with d4.

name: Four Knights Game
description: A symmetrical and simple opening ideal for learning natural development.
movesPreview: 1. e4 e5 2. Nf3 Nc6 3. Nc3 Nf6

name: London System
description: A reliable system opening with a fixed setup and simple plans.

name: Queen's Gambit Declined
description: A classical and solid defense against the Queen's Gambit.

name: Queen's Gambit
description: One of the most important queen's pawn openings, centered on long-term central tension.

name: Catalan Opening
description: A queen's pawn opening combined with a kingside fianchetto and long-term pressure.

name: Sicilian Defense
description: Black's most combative answer to 1.e4, leading to asymmetrical positions.

name: Sicilian Defense (Dragon Variation)
description: A sharp Sicilian with kingside fianchetto and mutual attacking chances.

name: Najdorf Sicilian
description: A deeply theoretical Sicilian built around ...a6 and flexible black counterplay.

name: Caro-Kann
description: A reliable defense with strong structure and long-term solidity.

name: French Defense
description: A resilient defense to 1.e4 that challenges White's center from a distance.

name: King's Indian Defense
description: A dynamic defense where Black allows space and later attacks the center and kingside.

name: Grunfeld Defense
description: A sharp defense based on piece activity and pressure against White's center.

name: Nimzo-Indian Defense
description: A highly respected defense built around flexible pawn structures and piece pressure.

name: English Opening
description: A flexible flank opening that can transpose into many different structures.
